content.principles: Uses ES6 Proxy instead of Object.defineProperty. Proxy allows intercepting object operations (get, set, deleteProperty, etc.). Dependency collection (track) and update dispatch (trigger) use a global WeakMap -> Map -> Set structure.
content.pitfalls: Reactive loss when destructuring (use toRefs). Primitive values need 'ref()'. Proxy cannot intercept operations on objects that are not accessed through the proxy.
